summary: V7 Shop/profile/title expansion verified. Backend 13/13 pytest passed covering /api/shop/profile-items (9 icons/30 anims/8 banners), /api/shop/buy-profile-item, /api/profile/me/titles, /api/profile/me/equip, /api/profile/{username}. Frontend: Shop renders 5 tabs (Boosts/Colors/Icons/Anims/Banners — note tab id for Boosts is 'powerups'), 9 icons/30 anims/8 banners render, 2-col grid on mobile (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3), tabs container overflow-x-auto for mobile scroll. Progress page confirmed NO all-time stats. Settings has Profile Customization section. Public profile /profile/Admin6419 renders banner, avatar, Level 4 Achiever, Total XP 720, streak, longest streak, habits done. Admin successfully purchased an icon and equipped it via the API (persistence verified). One React console warning reported below.

ui_bugs.issue: React warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key xp_boost_2xcommon'. Shop inventory generator (generate_shop_inventory) creates 4 random slots and often picks the same common item (e.g., xp_boost_2x) multiple times; the grid uses key={`${item.id}-${item.rarity}`} or similar non-unique composite causing duplicate React keys. Fix: use array index in key (e.g., key={`${idx}-${item.id}`}) OR dedupe inventory on insert.

issues: Level badge renders 'Level 4 -- Achiever' with double-dash — cosmetic; consider '•' separator or en-dash '—'.

passed_tests: GET /api/shop/profile-items returns exactly 9 icons, 30 animations, 8 banners with required fields (key, name, rarity, price, owned; animations have css; banners have gradient)
GET /api/profile/{username} returns equipped_title, equipped_icon, equipped_animation, equipped_banner, earned_titles
POST /api/shop/buy-profile-item (type=icon) — purchase succeeds, unlocked_icons updated, gems decremented
PUT /api/profile/me/equip rejects unearned title with 400 (admin cannot equip 'The Sovereign Overlord')
Frontend: Shop 5 tabs visible (powerups/colors/icons/anims/banners) desktop + mobile
Frontend: Icons tab renders 9 items, Anims renders 30 items, Banners renders 8 items
Frontend: Mobile (390px) — shop-tabs has overflow-x-auto, icon-grid uses grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3
Frontend: Progress page has no all-time stats section
Frontend: /profile/Admin6419 renders with username, Level/Achiever badge, Total XP 720, Current Streak, Longest Streak 7, Habits Done 22, Member since Apr 2026
action_items: Fix React key duplication in ShopPage PowerUpsGrid: when random shop inventory contains duplicates of the same power-up (e.g., xp_boost_2x appears twice in 4 slots), React logs 'Encountered two children with the same key'. Use array index in key or dedupe inventory when generating.
Optional cosmetic: replace '--' separator in level badge on public profile with '•' or em-dash.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py generate_shop_inventory() picks 4 random items independently — can produce duplicates. If business intent is unique slots, dedupe or use random.sample across candidates.

PUT /api/profile/me/equip correctly validates ownership for icon/animation/banner using user.get(field, []) but reads from the already-loaded user doc — if the user just purchased an item in the same session, the stale user doc may not include it. Consider re-fetching user doc inside equip_profile_item for freshness.
Public /api/profile/{username} endpoint is unauthenticated (correct) but does not apply rate limiting — could be abused for username enumeration via 404 vs 403 timing.

get_earned_titles does not sort titles or deduplicate — if a user reaches higher streak tiers, all lower titles are also returned (acceptable as 'unlocked collection'). Frontend should ensure proper display order.
ROAST_MESSAGES verified milder (no harsh words). Matches spec.

success_rate.frontend: 95% — 1 React console warning on PowerUpsGrid keys; all functional checks pass

seed_data_creation: Admin purchased one of the cheapest icons during test run (persisted in DB). Gems decremented by icon price. Equipped_icon set. Subsequent runs may skip purchase if all icons owned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop tab IDs are: powerups (labeled 'Boosts'), colors, icons, anims, banners. data-testids: tab-{id}, shop-{type}-{key} for items, icon-grid/animation-grid/banner-grid for containers. Admin username Admin6419. Admin has longest_streak=7 so only 'Rookie' streak title is earned (if backend threshold is 10 days, admin has zero titles — confirmed via test). To test equip title flow end-to-end via UI, main agent would need to seed admin with longest_streak_ever>=10 OR adjust streak title thresholds. Backend equip endpoint itself verified working with 400 for unearned and 200 for null unequip.
